---
title: "2.3 Locate & compare genes"
author: "Nguyen MTS"
date: "2026-05-13"
---

# *gyrA* mutations in fluoroquinolone-resistant *K. pneumoniae*

# Extract genes from assemblies

## Gene annotation

## Search & Extract

## Scale-up

# Gene alignment

## Why align genes?

## Aligning *gyrA* genes

## Visualizing alignments with Seaview

### DNA sequence alignment

### Protein sequence alignment
